status_quo: A 20% fee revenue overstatement means $240K in phantom revenue on the P&L — this is a material misstatement that affects regulatory reporting and investor confidence.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ's audit surfaced 3 findings and enabled targeted remediation that improved the reliability score from 33 to 81.
headline_finding: 54 near-duplicate rows detected (identical on all fields except key columns). This suggests duplicate ingestion or recording.
